corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This announcement concerns tax guidance for religious organizations regarding the Johnson Amendment (political campaign intervention by tax-exempt organizations). It has no relevance to market structure or macro economic catalysts. No connection to financial markets, interest rates, monetary policy, fiscal policy, economic indicators, or market operations.
